basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Jr. Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 02-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Engineering, or closely related discipline with NET/GATE
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Engineering, or a closely related discipline with NET/GATE. Candidates with research experience related to construction materials, electrochemistry, durability of reinforced concrete structures, and corrosion of steel in cementitious systems will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Engineering, or a closely related discipline with NET/GATE. Candidates with research experience related to construction materials, electrochemistry, durability of reinforced concrete structures, and corrosion of steel in cementitious systems will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Application Fee 2026
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Salary 2026
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 02 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: A postgraduate degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Engineering, or a closely related discipline with NET/GATE is required. Research experience in specific areas is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA @27%.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email by sending your complete application with all required documents before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/154/2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Jr. Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from CFTIs with a good CGPA apply without NET/GATE?
faq.answer: Yes, the NET/GATE requirement may be relaxed for candidates graduating from CFTIs with a CGPA of more than 8.000.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application screening and a review of the email submission.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article.
